response.justification: Bogdan has 20 years of broad software engineering experience and recent hands-on involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, demonstrating adaptability. However, this is a director-level individual contributor role requiring recognized, deep AI expertise and a track record of advising strategic customers and partners on cloud and AI strategy — none of which is evidenced in the resume. His AI work began in April 2025, his academic background is in CS and fine arts (no advanced AI credentials), and his entire career arc reflects execution-focused individual contribution rather than technical strategy or external advisory influence.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering spanning web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure, comfortably clearing the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq includes direct contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) frameworks, showing timely upskilling in agentic AI
Genuine entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective and a consistent record of public knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks
concerns: AI expertise is only a few months old with no demonstrated AI products or platforms at meaningful scale, which is a core requirement for this role
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field and no recognized industry standing as an AI thought leader or strategist
No evidence of strategic customer or partner advisory work, internal technical leadership at director scope, or organizational influence beyond team-level engineering
